question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a kickoff document for next week (Sprint 9 Week 3: April 20-24), Markdown format, save to day25/. Include sprint_goal, key_deliverables (array with target_dates), and team_assignments. Add YAML frontmatter.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 18:04 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a kickoff document for next week (Sprint 9 Week 3: April 20-24), Markdown format, save to day25/. Include sprint_goal, key_deliverables (array with target_dates), and team_assignments. Add YAML frontmatter.

The user wants me to create a kickoff document for Sprint 9 Week 3 (April 20-24). I need to:

1. Use P2 naming: YYYYMMDD_*.md format - should be 20260420_sprint9_week3_kickoff.md (April 20 is the start date)
2. Include YAML frontmatter with ISO 8601 created_at (P3 for markdown files)
3. Include sprint_goal, key_deliverables (array with target_dates), and team_assignments
4. Append done.log entry per P5

Let me create this document now.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-20T09:00:00+08:00
sprint: 9
week: 3
date_range: April 20-24, 2026
---

# Sprint 9 Week 3 Kickoff

## Sprint Goal

Complete the Project Orion v2.5 API migration and finalize the deployment readiness checklist to ensure production rollout readiness by end of week.

## Key Deliverables

| Deliverable | Target Date | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------------|-------|--------|
| API v2.5 migration completion | 2026-04-21 | Alex Zhang | planned |
| Deployment readiness validation | 2026-04-22 | Dana | planned |
| Frontend integration testing | 2026-04-23 | Chen | planned |
| Performance benchmark report | 2026-04-24 | Bai | planned |
| Sprint 9 retrospective prep | 2026-04-24 | Alex Zhang | planned |

## Team Assignments

| Team Member | Role | Week 3 Focus |
|-------------|------|--------------|
| Alex Zhang | Tech Lead | API migration oversight, architecture decisions, stakeholder reporting |
| Bai | Backend Engineer | Performance optimization, benchmark testing, API documentation |
| Chen | Frontend Engineer | Integration testing, UI polish, bug fixes |
| Dana | QA Engineer | Deployment readiness validation, test case execution, regression testing |

## Notes

- Daily standups at 10:00 CST
- Mid-week review scheduled for April 22
- Blockers to be escalated immediately via Slack #sprint-9 channel

content.text: Good, the file was created. Now I need to append the done.log entry per P5.
